title: Location Areas, Encounter Relations, Filtering, and Exploration · Go Semantics Case: Pokedex Go Explore Fixtures
summary: Explore confuses locations with location areas, requests unbounded encounter data, prints duplicates, ignores empty relations, and loses which area produced each Pokemon. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go explore fixtures increment in provenance-preserving location encounter explorer. Learners progress through prediction, expl…
objectives: Test empty, duplicate, multi-version, malformed relation, large, filtered, cached, and changed-area fixtures.
Bound response bytes, records processed, output rows, optional filters, cache use, and prefetch concurrency.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
